WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2020 Continued To Jun-17-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Transferring Venue
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Noah H. Phillips, Esq. of ALTAIR LAW, T:415.988.9828, for plaintiff;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion For An Order Transferring Venue, as follows:

Defendant LYFT, Inc.'s motion for an order transferring venue is denied. On a motion to change venue, the burden is on the moving party to show (1) that venue is proper in a different county than the one in which the lawsuit was filed and (2) that venue is improper in the current county under any applicable theory. (La Mirada Comm. Hosp. v. Sup. Ct. (1967) 249 Cal.App.2d 39, 42.) Defendant fails to show that venue is improper in San Francisco County under any applicable theory. (See Code Civ. Proc. 395(a), 395.5; Compl. 8(b).) "Lyft does not contest that its corporate residence is in San Francisco." (Reply at 2.)

Defendant's motion to change of venue under Code of Civil Procedure 397(c) is procedurally improper given that Defendant has not yet filed an answer to Plaintiff's complaint. (See Cholakian & Associates v. Superior Court (2015) 236 Cal.App.4th 361, 368 ["The court will not entertain a motion for change of venue on the ground of convenience of witnesses when the defendant has not filed an answer, for the reason that until the issues are joined the court cannot determine what testimony will be material."].)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
